examples: The second is that the Germans miscalculate.
Sooner or later, one side or the other would miscalculate.
But Goldman appeared to miscalculate how serious and how long the crisis would be.
And did you miscalculate the extent that this appears to be non-negotiable here in Korea?
And when all was said in done, wow, did Claimant Wells Fargo miscalculate.
